hero.title: Your Journey to Global Education Starts Here
hero.subtitle: Expert guidance for university admissions, visas, and scholarships worldwide.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: From choosing the right program to arriving on campus, our platform and expert consultants guide you every step of the way.
features.universityDesc: AI-driven matching to find the perfect program based on your academic profile and career goals.
features.applicationDesc: Streamlined document collection, review, and direct submission to our partner institutions.
features.visaDesc: Expert guidance on visa applications with mock interviews and complete document checklists.

about.title: We Make Global Education
about.description: Founded in 2010, we have helped over 10,000 students from 50+ countries achieve their academic dreams. We're more than consultants — we're your partners in global success.
about.missionP1: We believe every motivated student deserves access to world-class education, regardless of their background. Our mission is to eliminate barriers and confusion from the international education journey.
about.missionP2: From your first inquiry to graduation day, we're with you every step — selecting the right university, crafting a compelling application, securing your visa, and settling into life abroad.
about.studentFirstDesc: Every decision we make centers on student success and wellbeing.
about.excellenceDesc: We maintain the highest standards in guidance and support.
about.innovationDesc: Using technology to streamline the application journey.
about.communityDesc: Building lifelong connections between students and institutions.
about.integrityDesc: Honest, transparent advice that puts students' interests first.
about.teamSubtitle: Expert consultants with decades of combined experience in international education.
about.ctaSubtitle: Book a free consultation with one of our expert advisors today.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Book a free consultation or ask us anything. Our advisors typically respond within 2 hours.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your education goals...
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. One of our advisors will contact you within 2 hours.
